variable.name: OpenThemeData
variable.type: function(hwnd: Cardinal; pszClassList: PWideChar): Cardinal;

variable.name: CloseThemeData
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal): Cardinal;

variable.name: DrawThemeBackground
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal; hdc: HDC; iPartId: Integer; iStateId: Integer; pRect: PRect; pClipRect: PRect): Cardinal;

variable.name: DrawThemeBackgroundEx
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal; hdc: HDC; iPartId: Integer; iStateId: Integer; pRect: PRect; pOptions: PDTBGOPTS): Cardinal;

variable.name: DrawThemeText
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal; hdc: HDC; iPartId: Integer; iStateId: Integer; pszText: PWideChar; iCharCount: Integer; dwTextFlags: Integer; dwTextFlags2: Integer; pRect: PRect): Cardinal;

variable.name: GetThemeBackgroundContentRect
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal; hdc: HDC; iPartId: Integer; iStateId: Integer; pBoundingRect: PRect; pContentRect: TRect): Cardinal;

variable.name: GetThemeBackgroundExtent
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal; hdc: HDC; iPartId: Integer; iStateId: Integer; pContentRect: PRect; pExtentRect: TRect): Cardinal;

variable.name: GetThemeTextExtent
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal; hdc: HDC; iPartId: Integer; iStateId: Integer; pszText: PWideChar; iCharCount: Integer; dwTextFlags: Integer; pBoundingRect: PRect; pExtentRect: TRect): Cardinal;

variable.name: GetThemeTextMetrics
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal; hdc: HDC; iPartId: Integer; iStateId: Integer; ptm: tagTEXTMETRICW): Cardinal;

variable.name: GetThemeBackgroundRegion
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal; hdc: HDC; iPartId: Integer; iStateId: Integer; pRect: PRect; pRegion: HRGN): Cardinal;

variable.name: HitTestThemeBackground
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal; hdc: HDC; iPartId: Integer; iStateId: Integer; dwOptions: Integer; pRect: PRect; hrgn: HRGN; ptTest: Integer; pwHitTestCode: Word): Cardinal;

variable.name: DrawThemeEdge
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal; hdc: HDC; iPartId: Integer; iStateId: Integer; pDestRect: PRect; uEdge: Word; uFlags: Word; pContentRect: TRect): Cardinal;

variable.name: DrawThemeIcon
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal; hdc: HDC; iPartId: Integer; iStateId: Integer; pRect: PRect; himl: Cardinal; iImageIndex: Integer): Cardinal;

variable.name: IsThemePartDefined
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal; iPartId: Integer; iStateId: Integer): Integer;

variable.name: IsThemeBackGroundPartiallyTransparent
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal; iPartId: Integer; iStateId: Integer): Integer;

variable.name: GetThemeColor
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal; iPartId: Integer; iStateId: Integer; iPropId: Integer; pColor: TColor): Cardinal;

variable.name: GetThemeMetric
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal; hdc: HDC; iPartId: Integer; iStateId: Integer; iPropId: Integer; piVal: Integer): Cardinal;

variable.name: GetThemeString
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal; iPartId: Integer; iStateId: Integer; iPropId: Integer; pszBuff: PWideChar; cchMaxBuffChars: Integer): Cardinal;

variable.name: GetThemeBool
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal; iPartId: Integer; iStateId: Integer; iPropId: Integer; pfVal: LongBool): Cardinal;

variable.name: GetThemeInt
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal; iPartId: Integer; iStateId: Integer; iPropId: Integer; piVal: Integer): Cardinal;

variable.name: GetThemeEnumValue
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal; iPartId: Integer; iStateId: Integer; iPropId: Integer; piVal: Integer): Cardinal;

variable.name: GetThemePosition
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal; iPartId: Integer; iStateId: Integer; iPropId: Integer; pPoint: TPoint): Cardinal;

variable.name: GetThemeFont
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal; hdc: HDC; iPartId: Integer; iStateId: Integer; iPropId: Integer; pFont: tagLOGFONTW): Cardinal;

variable.name: GetThemeRect
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal; iPartId: Integer; iStateId: Integer; iPropId: Integer; pRect: TRect): Cardinal;

variable.name: GetThemeMargins
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal; hdc: HDC; iPartId: Integer; iStateId: Integer; iPropId: Integer; prc: TRect; pMargins: TRect): Cardinal;

variable.name: GetThemeIntList
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal; iPartId: Integer; iStateId: Integer; iPropId: Integer; pIntList: Pointer): Cardinal;

variable.name: SetWindowTheme
variable.type: function(hwnd: HWND; pszSubAppName: PWideChar; pszSubIdList: PWideChar): Cardinal;

variable.name: GetThemeFilename
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal; iPartId: Integer; iStateId: Integer; iPropId: Integer; pszThemeFileName: PWideChar; cchMaxBuffChars: Integer): Cardinal;

variable.name: GetThemeSysColor
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal; iColorId: Integer): Integer;

variable.name: GetThemeSysColorBrush
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal; iColorId: Integer): Integer;

variable.name: GetThemeSysBool
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal; iBoolId: Integer): Integer;

variable.name: GetThemeSysSize
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal; iSizeId: Integer): Integer;

variable.name: GetThemeSysFont
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal; iFontId: Integer; plf: tagLOGFONTW): Cardinal;

variable.name: GetThemeSysString
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal; iStringId: Integer; pszStringBuff: PWideChar; cchMaxStringChars: Integer): Cardinal;

variable.name: GetThemeSysInt
variable.type: function(hTheme: Cardinal; iIntId: Integer; piValue: Integer): Cardinal;

variable.name: IsThemeActive
variable.type: function: LongBool;

variable.name: IsAppThemed
variable.type: function: LongBool;

variable.name: GetWindowTheme
variable.type: function(hwnd: HWND): Integer;

variable.name: EnableThemeDialogTexture
variable.type: function(hwnd: HWND; dwFlags: Integer): Cardinal;

variable.name: IsThemeDialogTextureEnabled
variable.type: function(hwnd: HWND): LongBool;

variable.name: GetThemeAppProperties
variable.type: function: Cardinal;

variable.name: SetThemeAppProperties
variable.type: function(dwFlags: Cardinal): Integer;

variable.name: GetCurrentThemeName
variable.type: function(pszThemeFileName: PWideChar; cchMaxNameChars: Integer; pszColorBuff: PWideChar; cchMaxColorChars: Integer; pszSizeBuff: PWideChar; cchMaxSizeChars: Integer): Cardinal;

variable.name: GetThemeDocumentationProperty
variable.type: function(pszThemeName: PWideChar; pszPropertyName: PWideChar; pszValueBuff: PWideChar; cchMaxValChars: Integer): Cardinal;

variable.name: DrawThemeParentBackground
variable.type: function(hwnd: HWND; hdc: HDC; prc: TRect): Cardinal;

variable.name: EnableTheming
variable.type: function(fEnable: LongBool): Cardinal;
